prompt: I want to add a new project to the agent. The project is called 'Website Redesign', the plan_id is 'plan-abc123', group_id is 'grp-xyz456'. The owner is sarah@company.com and it runs from 2026-05-01 to 2026-09-30.

assertions.text: A config.yaml was created under projects/website-redesign/ with the correct plan_id and group_id
The agent conducted an interview asking about scope, goals, milestones, risks, and stakeholders before writing documents
At least 10 of 15 documents were created with real content (not just empty stubs)
The project was registered in projects/index.yaml
A connection validation step was attempted (tasks list or equivalent)
